feed.title: Journal of Literary Semantics - An International Review
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of Literary Semantics - An International Review (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Challenging novels: developing a checklist of stylistic markers of difficulty in prose fiction
entry.summary: Authors: Peter Harvey DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jls-2026-2005 Pages: Page range: 1-22

entry.title: Projection as a determinant of pronominal reference: a study of zero and personal pronouns in Haruki Murakami’s1Q84
entry.summary: Authors: Yasunori Sumidai DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jls-2026-2006 Pages: Page range: 23-41

entry.title: To de-empathise or not, that is the question: understanding de-empathy in Chinese television literature
entry.summary: Authors: Kun Yang, Yansheng Mao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jls-2026-2004 Pages: Page range: 43-61

entry.title: Graphic criticism. Semantics, neurology and cultural transmission – a study of 100 classic Anglophone novels
entry.summary: Authors: Karina van Dalen-Oskam DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jls-2026-2002 Pages: Page range: 63-65

entry.title: Neurocomputational poetics: how the brain processes verbal art
entry.summary: Authors: Peter Stockwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jls-2026-2003 Pages: Page range: 67-69

entry.title: Narrative and its nonevents. The unwritten plots that shaped Victorian Realism
entry.summary: Authors: Marina Lambrou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jls-2026-2001 Pages: Page range: 71-73
